title: vigna stenophylla
intro: Vigna stenophylla, also known as the narrow-leafed cowpea or Vigna stenophylla, is a perennial legume that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vigna stenophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or ointment to treat skin conditions and wounds.
